properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 102/23
 M/V RAMFORM VICTORY/LAIG5 IS TOWING SEISMIC CABLES IN AN AREA BOUNDED BY THE FOLLOWING COORDINATES:

 A. 67-19.3N 006-28.5E
 B. 67-30.2N 006 04.7E
 C. 67-11.0N 004-26.7E
 D. 66-52.8N 004-13.2E
 E. 66-37.9N 003-02.1E
 F. 66-17.0N 003-49.0E
 G. 66-43.0N 006-12.3E
 H. 67-07.2N 005-21.3E

 RAMFORM VICTORY IS TOWING 9 STREAMERS OF 6NM IN LENGTH, AND 1NM WIDTH
 WIDE BERTH 7NM ASTERN AND 3NM ABEAM REQUESTED.
 SURVEY VESSEL STANDING BY VHF 08 AND CH16
 GUARD VESSEL 7-STARS
